structural_claim: Macroscopic quantum coherence emerges from microscopic quantum mechanics through collective phenomena, creating states that exhibit quantum properties at scales far beyond individual particles

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Environmental entanglement explains how classical behavior emerges from quantum mechanics through information dispersal
Classical objectivity emerges through redundant encoding of selected quantum information in the environment
Macroscopic quantum coherence arises from Cooper pair formation, creating a collective quantum state
Macroscopic quantum phenomena can be described by complex order parameter fields with spontaneous symmetry breaking
Macroscopic quantum phase coherence enables tunneling phenomena between superconductors
